name: Epona's Chicken in Pastry
recipeIngredient: 1 8 oz. package refrigerated crescent roll dough (I used the cheese kind)
recipeInstructions:
1. Poach the chicken in just enough water to cover for 15-20 minutes, then drain.
2. Unroll the dough and separate into 4 sections, pinching the dough to seal any perforations.
3. Spread minced garlic over the dough to taste.
4. Place one chicken breast on each sheet of dough, and fold the dough to form a pouch around the chicken.
5. Seal the edges with a bit of egg wash, ensuring the seam side is down on a greased baking sheet.
6. Bake at 400°F for 10-12 minutes.
7. In a separate saucepan, blend together the remaining ingredients. Bring to a boil, reduce heat, and simmer for 5 minutes.
8. Drizzle the sauce over the chicken and serve. (This sauce is also delicious with asparagus.)
Serves 4
